text: Lesson 7
zh: 第7课

text: Mutilated Ladies
zh: 被损毁的女士们

text: Why did Jane cook John's wallet?
zh: 简为什么要把约翰的钱包煮了？

text: Has it ever happened to you?
zh: 这种事有没有发生在你身上过？

text: Have you ever put your trousers in the washing machine and then remembered there was a large bank note in your back pocket?
zh: 你有没有把裤子放进洗衣机，然后才想起后兜里还有一张大额钞票？

text: When you rescued your trousers, did you find the note was whiter than white?
zh: 当你把裤子救出来时，发现那张钞票被洗得比原来还白吗？

text: People who live in Britain needn't despair when they make mistakes like this (and a lot of people do)!
zh: 住在英国的人犯了这种错误（很多人确实会犯）用不着绝望！

text: Fortunately for them, the Bank of England has a team called Mutilated Ladies
zh: 对他们来说幸运的是，英格兰银行有一个叫“被损毁的女士们”的小组，

text: which deals with claims from people who fed their money to a machine or to their dog.
zh: 专门处理人们把钱喂给机器或狗的索赔申请。

text: Dogs, it seems, love to chew up money!
zh: 看起来，狗狗特别喜欢嚼钱！

text: A recent case concerns Jane Butlin whose fiance, John, runs a successful furniture business.
zh: 最近的一个案例涉及简·巴特林，她的未婚夫约翰经营着一家生意兴隆的家具公司。

text: John had a very good day and put his wallet containing ￡3, 000 into the microwave oven for safekeeping.
zh: 约翰那天生意特别好，为了保管安全，把装有3000英镑的钱包放进了微波炉。

text: Then he and Jane went horse-riding.
zh: 然后他和简去骑马了。

text: When they got home, Jane cooked their dinner in the microwave oven and without realizing it, cooked her fiance's wallet as well.
zh: 他们回到家后，简用微波炉做晚饭，却没意识到，把未婚夫的钱包也一起“煮”了。

text: Imagine their dismay when they found a beautifully-cooked wallet and notes turned to ash!
zh: 想象一下，当他们发现一个被烤得漂漂亮亮的钱包、钞票都化成了灰烬时，该有多沮丧！

text: John went to see his bank manager who sent the remains of wallet and the money
zh: 约翰去找了他的银行经理，经理把钱包残骸和钱一起寄

text: to the special department of the Bank of England in Newcastle: the Mutilated Ladies!
zh: 到了位于纽卡斯尔的英格兰银行特别部门：“被损毁的女士们”！

text: They examined the remains and John got all his money back.
zh: 他们检查了残骸，约翰拿回了全部的钱。

text: 'So long as there's something to identify, we will give people their money back,' said a spokeswoman for the Bank.
zh: 银行的一位女发言人说：“只要还有能辨认的部分，我们就会把钱还给大家。”

text: 'Last year, we paid ￡1.5 million on 21,000 claims.'
zh: “去年，我们为21000件索赔支付了150万英镑。”
